scripts.build: npm run build -w @bank-el7az/shared && npm run build -w @bank-el7az/server && npm run build -w @bank-el7az/client
scripts.dev: npm run build -w @bank-el7az/shared && concurrently -n shared,server,client -c cyan,green,magenta "npm run dev -w @bank-el7az/shared" "npm run dev -w @bank-el7az/server" "npm run dev -w @bank-el7az/client"
scripts.test: npm run build -w @bank-el7az/shared && npm run test -w @bank-el7az/server
scripts.lint: npm run check -w @bank-el7az/shared && npm run check -w @bank-el7az/server && npm run check -w @bank-el7az/client
